title: Better Trapped Chests
description: It render the trapped chests undetectable.
body:
/!\ This resource pack need [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home) or [CEM](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem)
This Resource Pack remove the red part of trapped chest than we see easy. Now, we don't know it's a trapped chests.

It's cool for troll your friends.
Here's my discord for suggest ideas or report an issue : https://discord.gg/7yXRx6yVVy
